input.headline: The mystery of the abandoned Achill Island village of Slievemore

raw.headline: The mystery of the abandoned Achill Island village of Slievemore

winner: The villagers of Slievemore didn’t abandon their town—they just got tired of people asking if they’d seen *Slievemore’s* famous hill, which turned out to be nothing more than a very confused sheep standing on a rock.

candidates.text: The villagers of Slievemore didn’t abandon their town—they just got tired of people asking if they’d seen *Slievemore’s* famous hill, which turned out to be nothing more than a very confused sheep standing on a rock.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a specific reference to the village and its famous hill, delivered in a concise and humorous manner."}

candidates.text: The villagers of Slievemore didn't abandon their home—they just took a group vacation and forgot to come back.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on abandonment, concise and specific to the village, with a light-hearted and imaginative explanation."}

candidates.text: The villagers of Slievemore finally left because they were convinced their island was just a really elaborate set for a James Bond movie.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising and specific twist on the mystery, with a creative and concise punchline."}

candidates.text: The mystery of the abandoned village of Slievemore was finally solved when archaeologists discovered that the residents didn't flee a plague or a famine, but simply realized that living on an island with no Wi-Fi was a terrible way to spend a Tuesday.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with modern relevance, concise and specific, uses natural humor"}

candidates.text: The mystery of the abandoned village of Slievemore was finally solved when archaeologists discovered that the residents hadn't vanished, they had simply taken the "abandoned" part of the instructions literally and left before the village was even finished.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative twist on the mystery, concise and surprising with good specificity to the headline topic."}

candidates.text: The mystery of the abandoned village of Slievemore remains unsolved, but the locals are sure it wasn't a tragedy; the residents just decided to take a permanent leave of absence from reality.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.2, "reason": "Surprising twist with 'permanent leave of absence from reality' adds humor while staying specific to the headline."}
